name: arifOS Constitutional Kernel
description: Constitutional AI governance kernel for the arifOS federation. Owns F1-F13 floors, 888 JUDGE, 999 VAULT SEAL, and authority routing. Public MCP tool execution is routed through the canonical gateway at mcp.arif-fazil.com.

skills.name: Constitutional Session Init
skills.description: Initialize governed session with authority binding, floor acknowledgment, and sovereignty declaration. Golden path entry point.

skills.name: Evidence Binding
skills.description: Gather and label evidence with epistemic discipline (OBS/DER/INT/SPEC). Search, ingest, and ground queries in reality.

skills.name: Multi-Step Reasoning
skills.description: Plan, critique, verify, and reflect with confidence labeling. Modes: reason, critique, verify, plan.

skills.name: Intent Classification
skills.description: Route natural-language intent to the correct federation organ or kernel tool. Canonical intent router.

skills.name: Constitutional Verdict
skills.description: Render binding judgment on proposed actions. Evaluates intent, capability, blast radius, reversibility. Verdicts: PROCEED, HOLD, VOID, PARTIAL.

skills.name: Immutable Audit Seal
skills.description: Seal verdicts and outcomes to VAULT999 immutable ledger. Final, irreversible records preserved forever.

skills.name: Governed Execution
skills.description: Execute actions with valid prior SEAL from arif_judge. The 900-gate — no seal, no action.

skills.name: F1-F13 Floor Enforcement
skills.description: Enforce all 13 constitutional floors (AMANAH, TRUTH, CLARITY, MARUAH, LAW, ANTI-HANTU, AUDIT, SOVEREIGN, etc.) across federation actions.

skills.name: G-Score Computation
skills.description: Compute constitutional alignment score (G-Score) for proposed actions across all 13 floors.

skills.name: Risk Assessment
skills.description: Assess blast radius and reversibility level for any proposed action. Determines verdict gate: 000→111→333→666→888→999.
